items.title_en: Dunkin' owner Inspire Brands confidentially files for IPO

items.desc_en: The restaurant company owns Dunkin', Arby's, Buffalo Wild Wings, Baskin Robbins, Sonic Drive-In and Jimmy John's.
items.desc_zh: 该餐饮公司旗下拥有 Dunkin'、Arby's、Buffalo Wild Wings、Baskin Robbins、Sonic Drive-In 和 Jimmy John's。

items.title_en: The Trump-Xi summit is the next major deadline for investors awaiting a resolution to the U.S.-Iran war. Here's what's ahead
items.title_zh: 对于等待美伊战争解决方案的投资者来说，特习峰会是下一个重要最后期限。这是接下来的事情
items.desc_en: Trump's apparent determination to wrap up the fighting in Iran is part of the reason why the stock market has been unruffled by the ongoing conflict.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普明显决心结束伊朗战斗，这是股市不受持续冲突影响的部分原因。

items.title_en: Wall Street sees 'changing of the guard in AI' as Intel, AMD shares soar while Nvidia lags
items.title_zh: 随着英特尔、AMD 股价飙升，而英伟达落后，华尔街认为人工智能领域“换岗”
items.desc_en: Intel, AMD and Micron surged double digits this week as investors bet on CPU makers and memory companies powering the next stage of AI
items.desc_zh: 英特尔、AMD 和美光本周股价飙升两位数，投资者押注 CPU 制造商和内存公司为人工智能下一阶段提供动力

items.title_en: Iran focus at Trump-Xi summit may delay progress on tariffs, rare earths
items.title_zh: 特朗普与习近平峰会的焦点可能会推迟关税和稀土方面的进展
items.desc_en: Thanks to the Iran war, big issues for U.S. businesses like rare earths and supply chains may take a back seat on the agenda for the Trump-Xi summit.
items.desc_zh: 由于伊朗战争，稀土和供应链等美国企业面临的重大问题可能在特习峰会议程上退居二线。

items.title_zh: Rocket Lab 营收飙升 30%，创纪录的发射交易，创下新高
items.desc_en: Enthusiasm for space stocks has skyrocketed ahead of SpaceX's anticipated IPO.
items.desc_zh: 在 SpaceX 预期首次公开募股之前，人们对太空股票的热情高涨。

items.title_en: Micron surges more than 30% on week as memory chip rally goes parabolic
items.title_zh: 内存芯片涨势呈抛物线走势，美光本周股价飙升逾 30%
items.desc_en: Micron Technology shares caught fire this week amid a global shortage of memory chips. The stock is heading for its best week since 2008.
items.desc_zh: 由于全球存储芯片短缺，美光科技股价本周遭遇重挫。该股正迎来自 2008 年以来表现最好的一周。

items.title_en: Virginia Supreme Court strikes down redistricting push in blow to Democrats
items.title_zh: 弗吉尼亚州最高法院否决重新划分选区的努力，对民主党造成打击
items.desc_en: In the ongoing redistricting wars, Virginia was seen as an opportunity for Democrats to pick up as many as four U.S. House seats in the 2026 midterm elections.
items.desc_zh: 在正在进行的选区重新划分战争中，弗吉尼亚州被视为民主党在 2026 年中期选举中获得多达 4 个美国众议院席位的机会。

items.title_en: Iran accuses US of 'reckless military adventure'
items.title_zh: 伊朗指责美国“鲁莽的军事冒险”
items.desc_en: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says the US opts for a "reckless military adventure" every time a "diplomatic solution is on the table".
items.desc_zh: 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格奇表示，每次“外交解决方案摆在桌面上”时，美国都会选择“鲁莽的军事冒险”。

items.title_en: U.S. payrolls increased 115,000 in April, more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%
items.title_zh: 美国4月非农就业人数增加11.5万人，超出预期；失业率为 4.3%
items.desc_en: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 55,000 in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.
items.desc_zh: 根据道琼斯共识，4 月份非农就业人数预计将增加 55,000 人。

items.title_en: Anthropic's Mythos set off a cybersecurity 'hysteria.' Experts say the threat was already here
items.title_zh: Anthropic 的神话引发了网络安全的“歇斯底里”。专家称威胁已经存在
items.desc_en: The arrival of Anthropic's Mythos jolted banks, software giants and governments into reckoning with a new era of cyber attacks. But the threat is already here.
items.desc_zh: Anthropic Mythos 的到来让银行、软件巨头和政府开始思考网络攻击的新时代。但威胁已经来临。

items.title_en: Trump's $1 million 'Gold Card' fails to catch on among the world's wealthy
items.title_zh: 特朗普的100万美元“金卡”未能在全球富豪中流行起来
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump's "Gold Card," which promised U.S. residency in "record time," has been dogged by delays and legal questions.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统的“金卡”承诺在“创纪录的时间内”获得美国居留权，但一直受到延误和法律问题的困扰。

items.title_en: Worldwide race to trace passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship
items.title_zh: 全球竞相追踪受汉坦病毒袭击的游轮上的乘客
items.desc_en: About 12 countries have so far been linked to the hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius, as the UN health agency confirms at least five cases.
items.desc_zh: 迄今为止，约有 12 个国家与 MV Hondius 上的汉坦病毒爆发有关，联合国卫生机构已确认至少 5 例病例。

items.title_en: Cyber attack disrupts swathe of US and Canada universities and schools
items.title_zh: 网络攻击扰乱了美国和加拿大的大片大学和学校
items.desc_en: A hacking group breached the academic software Canvas, used by thousands of schools and universities across North America.
items.desc_zh: 一个黑客组织入侵了北美数千所学校和大学使用的学术软件 Canvas。

items.title_en: Marco Rubio says U.S. expects Iran response on peace deal 'today'
items.title_zh: 马可·卢比奥表示，美国期望伊朗“今天”对和平协议做出回应
items.desc_en: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Friday that the U.S. is expecting a response from Iran on Washington's proposal to end the war.
items.desc_zh: 美国国务卿卢比奥周五表示，美国期待伊朗对华盛顿结束战争的提议做出回应。

items.title_en: White House calls Mark Hamill 'sick' after actor's Trump grave post
items.title_zh: 演员马克·哈米尔在特朗普墓碑上发表言论后，白宫称他“有病”
items.desc_en: The Star Wars actor apologised and deleted the post, which contained an AI image of the president in a shallow grave.
items.desc_zh: 这位星球大战演员道歉并删除了该帖子，其中包含总统在浅坟墓中的人工智能图像。

items.title_en: US jet fuel could be used in Europe to ease possible shortages
items.title_zh: 美国航空燃油可用于欧洲以缓解可能的短缺
items.desc_en: The price of jet fuel most European airlines currently use has jumped by half since the start of the war.
items.desc_zh: 自战争开始以来，大多数欧洲航空公司目前使用的航空燃油价格已经上涨了一半。

items.title_en: South Africa president faces call to resign after court ruling
items.title_zh: 法院裁决后南非总统面临辞职
items.desc_en: The Constitutional Court says MPs were was wrong to block impeachment proceedings against Cyril Ramaphosa.
items.desc_zh: 宪法法院表示，国会议员阻止针对西里尔·拉马福萨的弹劾程序是错误的。

items.title_en: Russia and Ukraine accuse each other of breaching Victory Day ceasefire
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯和乌克兰互相指责对方违反胜利日停火协议
items.desc_en: The two sides report responding to hundreds of drone attacks, just hours into a truce to cover celebrations of the Soviet Union's victory over Nazi Germany.
items.desc_zh: 双方报告称，对数百起无人机袭击做出了回应，而休战仅几个小时后，两国就庆祝苏联战胜纳粹德国进行了报道。

items.title_en: Three dead after volcano erupts on Indonesian island
items.title_zh: 印度尼西亚岛屿火山喷发 造成三人死亡
items.desc_en: Officials had previously issued warnings on climbing the active volcano due to safety concerns.
items.desc_zh: 出于安全考虑，官员此前曾对攀登活火山发出警告。

items.title_en: TikTok rows back AI video descriptions in US after absurd errors
items.title_zh: TikTok 在美国因出现荒谬错误而收回人工智能视频描述
items.desc_en: While only rolled out to some TikTok users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.
items.desc_zh: 虽然仅向部分 TikTok 用户推出，但该功能由人工智能生成的奇异描述却被广泛分享。

items.title_en: Oil prices rise after US and Iran exchange fire in Hormuz strait
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡交火后油价上涨
items.desc_en: US President Donald Trump says the ceasefire between Washington and Tehran is still in place.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，华盛顿和德黑兰之间的停火仍然有效。

items.title_en: Ethiopian woman's joy at rare quintuplets after 12 years trying for a baby
items.title_zh: 埃塞俄比亚妇女苦苦等待12年，终于迎来罕见的五胞胎
items.desc_en: The woman, 35, says she was praying for a baby and was "overjoyed" to be "blessed with five at once".
items.desc_zh: 这位 35 岁的女士说，她正在为自己的孩子祈祷，并“非常高兴”“同时拥有五个孩子”。

items.title_en: Rebel Wilson accused of 'complete revision of history' as defamation case closes
items.title_zh: 诽谤案结束后，叛逆威尔逊被指控“彻底修改历史”
items.desc_en: The Bridesmaids star claims an actress retracted a complaint about sexual harassment by a producer.
items.desc_zh: 这位伴娘明星声称一名女演员撤回了对制片人性骚扰的投诉。

items.title_en: Third British national has suspected hantavirus infection, UK government says
items.title_zh: 英国政府称第三名英国国民疑似感染汉坦病毒
items.desc_en: The patient is on the remote Atlantic island of Tristan da Cunha, which was visited by the cruise ship in April.
